docs.text: Welcome to Computational Modeling Library Computational Modeling Library is an ecosystem of Python packages for reproducible computational modeling of behavioral decision-making tasks. It’s designed to support common research workflows such as model fitting , parameter recovery , and model recovery —with a focus on clear task specifications and auditable likelihood computation . Getting Started We highly recommend following the following tutorials: Overview Install comp_model packages Fit a standard reinforcement learning model to a public dataset Perform parameter recovery on a standard reinforcement learning model Perform model recovery on a set of reinforcement learning models
